infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: spent. uses speech recognition only when you tap the microphone, to turn what you say into a spend amount.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: spent. uses the microphone only while you are adding an amount by voice.

plugins.microphonePermission: spent. uses the microphone only while you are adding an amount by voice.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: spent. uses speech recognition only when you tap the microphone, to capture a spend amount.
